Source URL: https://www.score.org/employee-to-entrepreneur/

# SCORE Employee to Entrepreneur Hub

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, topic-hub

## Resource purpose
Resources for people moving from employment into entrepreneurship.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when a user has a job and is exploring a side business, transition, or full-time entrepreneurship.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
Ideation and Validation

## Route the user here when
The user asks about leaving a job, starting while employed, building income on the side, or evaluating readiness.

## BOSS routing notes
- Assess time, financial runway, employer conflict/noncompete concerns, and startup validation before advising transition.

## Related SCORE links
- Small Business Resource Hubs: https://www.score.org/small-business-resource-hubs/
- Business education: https://www.score.org/business-education/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
